reviews.review_description: Just purchased my Oculus Go and was excited to see what sports VR apps were out there. I was happy to see that Fox had a VR app since I am an avid watcher of baseball and football. But when I launch the app, I’m stuck in the grey-scape with the logo in front of me that is constantly “loading”. After multiple tries and installs, I gave up because I sit watching the player “loading” even after 5-7 minutes.
Gooood
It stops working since last update please fix it, it says can not connected to internet
App says i need to sign in. How do i sign in?
App just loads and never come available for use?!? Could be a great platform. . Disappointing
Asked to sign in and nothing else happened
I downloaded the Fox To Go app from google play and signed in on that app and it carried over to Fox Sports VR in Oculus
Asked me too sign in to something, did NOTHING.
I can't believe they even try this. The resolution is so horrible it's embarrassing. Tiny little blurring players. Forget the ball. You can't even see it it's so blurred. Epic fail Fox!
Will not load any content

reviews.review_title: Dissappointing cannot view FoX sports GO
reviews.review_description:
After three or four attempts at seeing live activity I just gave up. I successfully logged into my cable account but whenever I insert my phone back into the headset, it fails to let me see streaming video.  I enter that stadium and there are only clips. I go to the Fox Sports GO and it takes me back to the log in screen after it already indicated I successfully logged in.

Just as well. The clips area was very low resolution.  I would imagine live streaming would be no better. I will just watch the game on the big screen for a better experience.  Maybe this app never went through QA.
What a disappointment. It opens, but is stuck on the loading screen.
Won't work if you don't have a TV subscription. Extremely disappointing. If this requirement was removed I would like to check it out, but for now it gets 1 star for not being a usable app.
Wanted to watch the game at app won’t load.
After 15 attempts, I gave up. There’s no way to scroll to the bottom of the list of providers. Typing on to search doesn’t work and scrolling always “clicks” instead of scrolling.
Told me to take phone out to sign in .. so I did.. I ended up at my home screen with all apps closed.. this happened about 8 times before I gave up.. was really excited too...
Like everyone else
I have an Oculus Go. I downloaded the app but when trying to open it it Does NOT load. Very frustrating!!!!
please make it so the rift can use this app. should be no reason why it cant run this.
I can’t login with Google Fiber cable. The Fox Now app works perfectly. Fox Sports doesn’t.
